reviews.author: Sashiko
reviews.summary: Identified a potential double-uncharging issue when disabling stock and suggested reordering the callsite to prevent it. Also noted that drain_all_stock() uses a mutex_trylock, which can fail.

2026-05-25.patch_summary: This patch series introduces a per-page_counter stock to improve memcg charging and limit checks, addressing issues such as random eviction of pages and tight coupling between stock and memcg.
